name: Sesame Green Beans & Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh green beans - cut into 1/4-inch strips
2 tablespoons Toasted sesame seeds (red or yellow may be substituted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and blanch in boiling water for about 2 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water.
2. Place the green beans, bell pepper, toasted sesame seeds, and sesame oil in a serving bowl.
3. Toss all ingredients together until evenly coated.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 84; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 7g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 305mg; FAT: 4g
